name: show_updates
description: Show unread updates from the event log.

name: list_jobs
description: List known jobs and their current status.

name: cpu_usage
description: Get current CPU usage from the local machine.

name: memory_usage
description: Get current RAM and memory usage from the local machine.
examples: how much memory am I using

name: disk_usage
description: Get current disk usage for the working filesystem.
examples: how much disk space is free

name: coding_task
description: Create, modify, debug, or run code through the Code Monkey builder.

name: chat
description: Answer general questions, explain concepts, or chat without tools.

name: classroom_start
description: Start a one-on-one classroom session on a subject. Builds a lesson plan grounded in the world knowledge base and teaches it step by step.
examples: start a classroom on the krebs cycle
I want to learn intro chemistry
begin a lesson on the french revolution
give me a lesson on graph algorithms
start tutoring me on linear algebra
let's do a class on rust ownership

name: classroom_open
description: Open a classroom and ask the user what they'd like to learn. Use this when the user names no subject up front — the system replies with 'What do you want to learn?' and the next user message becomes the subject.
examples: I want to start a classroom
i want to start a class

name: classroom_resume
description: Resume the most recent paused classroom session at the saved progress point.
examples: pick up where we left off in class

name: classroom_end
description: End the active classroom session and save progress.
